Try Berkeley Life for Free

settings.body_line_one: Blood flow is the foundation of energy, heart health, and longevity. Start with 3 days — on us.

settings.body: Reserved for Super Age readers. While supplies last.

settings.custom_description: Super Age showed you the science, now it's yours to try for free. Clinically proven daily Nitric Oxide support for blood flow, energy, heart health, and active aging - and loved by Super Age Execs. You'll receive 3 individual sample packs with a complete daily dose per pack and test strips to track your levels in real time.

settings.caption: Sample packs are free. Shipping applies at checkout.

settings.title: Who is this for?
settings.content:
For adults looking for clinically supported daily Nitric Oxide Support with measurable results.

Suitable for men and women over 18 who want simple, trackable support for blood flow, energy, sexual wellness and healthy aging.

settings.title: Ingredients
settings.ingredient_text_1: A potent source of dietary nitrates that is broken down in the body to form Nitric Oxide. Two of our capsules has the dietary nitrate equivalent of 7oz of beetroot.
settings.ingredient_text_2: An essential vitamin and potent antioxidant, Vitamin C helps convert nitrite to nitric oxide.
settings.ingredient_text_3: A crucial mineral respected for its ability to relax blood vessels; sufficient magnesium intake is important for cardiovascular health.

settings.title: How to use
settings.content:
Nitric Oxide Support
Take two capsules once a day with water after food. This dosage boosts Nitric Oxide levels throughout for up to 24 hours. Do not exceed the recommended daily intake unless under the direction of your physician.

Nitric Oxide Test Strips
1. Place the test strip on your tongue with the saliva here side facing down. Hold for 5 seconds.
2. Fold the strip in half, pressing the sides together gently for 10 seconds.
3. Unfold and compare your results with the Nitric Oxide Scale on the package.

settings.feature_text: Targets dietary nitrate pathway (effective with age)
Supports full nitric oxide pathway (system approach)

settings.title:
Are Your Nitric Oxide Levels 
**Holding You Back?**
settings.paragraph: NO naturally declines with age — by 50% by age 40, and continues dropping every decade. This invisible drop affects energy, heart health, and how every organ in your body performs.

settings.quote_text: “I view Nitric Oxide as a keystone for women’s health. When it’s supported, everything from exercise recovery to cognitive sharpness to everyday energy improves. That’s why I recommend Berkeley Life. It’s clinically effective, easy for women to integrate, and truly makes a difference.”

“Berkeley Life is a company that has gained my respect for their commitment to the development of science-based products that modulate Nitric Oxide status and function. Their commitment to scientific rigor and innovative solutions makes them a powerful ally in the pursuit of functional health.”

“Blood flow and healing are critical to the success of our treatments, and the integration of Nitric Oxide has really helped. We continue to promote Berkeley’s N.O. for all of our body procedures as well as men presenting to our men's clinic – our patients are loving the results.”

settings.question: What does Nitric Oxide do for my body?
settings.answer: Nitric Oxide signals your blood vessels to relax and widen, which improves circulation and delivers oxygen and nutrients more efficiently throughout your body. This supports energy, heart health, cognitive function, and overall vitality — especially as your natural NO production declines with age.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Many users notice a difference in energy and focus within the first 3–7 days. The at-home test strips let you see measurable improvement in your Nitric Oxide levels in as little as 10 seconds. Consistent daily use over 30–90 days delivers the most meaningful, lasting benefits.

settings.question: Can I take Berkeley Life with other medications?
settings.answer: Berkeley Life is generally safe to take alongside most supplements and medications. However, if you are taking blood pressure medications or other cardiovascular drugs, we recommend consulting your healthcare provider before starting.

settings.question: Is this product safe? Are there any side effects?
settings.answer: Berkeley Life is backed by 3 clinical trials and built on 28,000+ published studies. It is manufactured in an FDA-registered facility and trusted by over 5,000 healthcare providers. The formula is well tolerated; some users notice a mild headache during the first few days as NO levels adjust.

settings.question: Can I get these nutrients through diet alone?
settings.answer: While foods like beets, leafy greens, and pomegranate support NO production, achieving therapeutic levels through diet alone is very difficult — especially as you age. Berkeley Life uses a clinically validated formula that consistently delivers what diet alone cannot.

settings.question: What happens after the 3-day sample?
settings.answer: The 3-day sample is designed to give you measurable proof that the formula works for your body. After your trial, you can subscribe and save on a full supply — with no obligation. Most users who see their test strip results become long-term subscribers.
